_comment: branch-lifecycle plugin settings. Copy to <project>/.claude/branch-lifecycle-settings.json (or ~/.claude/ for a global default) and edit. Re-read every session — no reinstall needed. Each key maps to the env off-switch the hooks already honor; the settings-shim exports them before the hooks run.
_secret_scan_cmd_help: Leave empty to use the bundled grep-based secret scan (zero dependencies). Set to e.g. 'gitleaks protect --staged --no-banner' to use your own scanner. A non-clean result aborts the commit.
